name: Commit Message Generator
description: Generates conventional commit messages based on staged changes
description_zh: 根据暂存的变更自动生成规范的提交信息
author: community
content:
---
name: commit-message
description: Generate a conventional commit message
trigger: /commit
---

Analyze the staged git changes and generate a conventional commit message.

Rules:
- Use conventional commit format: type(scope): description
- Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore
- Keep the first line under 72 characters
- Add a body if the changes are complex

name: Code Review Assistant
description: Reviews code for bugs, performance issues, and best practices
description_zh: 审查代码中的错误、性能问题和最佳实践
author: community
content:
---
name: code-review
description: Review code for quality and issues
trigger: /review
---

Review the provided code thoroughly:
1. Check for bugs and logic errors
2. Identify performance issues
3. Suggest improvements for readability
4. Verify error handling
5. Check for security vulnerabilities

name: Test Generator
description: Generates unit tests for functions and classes
description_zh: 为函数和类自动生成单元测试
author: community
content:
---
name: test-generator
description: Generate unit tests
trigger: /test
---

Generate comprehensive unit tests for the selected code:
- Cover happy path and edge cases
- Include error scenarios
- Use the project's existing test framework
- Follow AAA pattern (Arrange, Act, Assert)

name: Documentation Generator
description: Generates JSDoc/TSDoc/docstring documentation for code
description_zh: 为代码生成 JSDoc/TSDoc/docstring 文档
author: community
content:
---
name: doc-generator
description: Generate documentation
trigger: /doc
---

Generate documentation for the selected code:
- Add JSDoc/TSDoc comments for TypeScript/JavaScript
- Add docstrings for Python
- Include parameter descriptions, return types, and examples
- Follow the project's existing documentation style

name: Refactor Assistant
description: Suggests and applies code refactoring patterns
description_zh: 建议并应用代码重构模式
author: community
content:
---
name: refactor-assistant
description: Refactor code for better quality
trigger: /refactor
---

Analyze and refactor the code:
- Extract repeated logic into functions
- Apply SOLID principles
- Simplify complex conditionals
- Improve naming conventions
- Reduce coupling between components

name: API Designer
description: Designs RESTful API endpoints with OpenAPI specs
description_zh: 设计 RESTful API 端点并生成 OpenAPI 规范
author: community
content:
---
name: api-designer
description: Design REST API endpoints
trigger: /api
---

Design RESTful API endpoints:
- Follow REST conventions (proper HTTP methods, status codes)
- Generate OpenAPI/Swagger spec
- Include request/response examples
- Consider pagination, filtering, and error responses

name: Security Scanner
description: Scans code for common security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10)
description_zh: 扫描代码中的常见安全漏洞（OWASP Top 10）
author: community
content:
---
name: security-scanner
description: Scan for security vulnerabilities
trigger: /security
---

Scan the codebase for security issues:
- SQL injection
- XSS vulnerabilities
- Insecure dependencies
- Hardcoded secrets
- Missing input validation
- Improper error handling

name: Dockerfile Generator
description: Generates optimized Dockerfiles and docker-compose configurations
description_zh: 生成优化的 Dockerfile 和 docker-compose 配置
author: community
content:
---
name: docker-generator
description: Generate Docker configurations
trigger: /docker
---

Generate Docker configurations:
- Multi-stage builds for smaller images
- Proper layer caching
- Security best practices (non-root user)
- docker-compose for local development
- Environment variable handling

name: Prompt Engineer
description: Helps craft and optimize prompts for LLM applications
description_zh: 帮助编写和优化 LLM 应用的提示词
author: community
content:
---
name: prompt-engineer
description: Craft and optimize LLM prompts
trigger: /prompt
---

Help design effective prompts:
- Structure with clear instructions
- Add examples (few-shot learning)
- Include constraints and output format
- Test for edge cases
- Optimize for token efficiency

name: Code Translator
description: Translates code between programming languages
description_zh: 在不同编程语言之间转换代码
author: community
content:
---
name: translate-code
description: Translate code between languages
trigger: /translate
---

Translate code to the target language:
- Preserve logic and behavior
- Use idiomatic patterns in the target language
- Handle language-specific features
- Add comments for non-obvious translations
- Include necessary imports

name: Git Branch Strategy
description: Suggests optimal git branch naming and workflow strategies
description_zh: 建议最优的 Git 分支命名和工作流策略
author: community
content:
---
name: git-branch-strategy
description: Suggest git branching strategies
trigger: /branch
---

Help with git branch management:
- Suggest branch names following conventions (feature/, bugfix/, hotfix/)
- Recommend branching strategy (Git Flow, GitHub Flow, Trunk-based)
- Help plan release branches
- Suggest PR/MR descriptions

name: Changelog Generator
description: Generates changelogs from git history following Keep a Changelog format
description_zh: 从 Git 历史生成符合 Keep a Changelog 格式的变更日志
author: community
content:
---
name: changelog-generator
description: Generate changelog from git history
trigger: /changelog
---

Generate a changelog entry:
- Follow Keep a Changelog format
- Categories: Added, Changed, Deprecated, Removed, Fixed, Security
- Extract info from commit messages since last tag
- Include links to PRs and issues
- Use semantic versioning for release headers

name: SQL Query Optimizer
description: Analyzes and optimizes SQL queries for better performance
description_zh: 分析并优化 SQL 查询以提升性能
author: community
content:
---
name: sql-optimizer
description: Optimize SQL queries
trigger: /sql
---

Optimize SQL queries:
- Analyze query execution plans
- Suggest index improvements
- Rewrite inefficient subqueries
- Optimize JOIN operations
- Recommend denormalization where appropriate
- Check for N+1 query patterns

name: Error Handler Generator
description: Generates comprehensive error handling code with proper patterns
description_zh: 生成包含正确模式的全面错误处理代码
author: community
content:
---
name: error-handler
description: Generate error handling patterns
trigger: /error
---

Generate robust error handling:
- Custom error classes/types hierarchy
- Try-catch with specific error types
- Error logging and monitoring hooks
- User-friendly error messages
- Retry logic for transient failures
- Circuit breaker patterns

name: Regex Builder
description: Builds and explains regular expressions with test cases
description_zh: 构建并解释正则表达式，提供测试用例
author: community
content:
---
name: regex-builder
description: Build and test regular expressions
trigger: /regex
---

Help build regular expressions:
- Create regex from natural language description
- Explain existing regex step by step
- Generate test cases for edge cases
- Suggest performance-friendly alternatives
- Provide regex for common patterns (email, URL, phone, etc.)

name: CI/CD Pipeline Generator
description: Generates CI/CD pipeline configurations for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.
description_zh: 生成 GitHub Actions、GitLab CI 等 CI/CD 流水线配置
author: community
content:
---

description: Generate CI/CD pipeline configs
trigger: /ci
---

Generate CI/CD pipeline configurations:
- GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or CircleCI
- Build, test, lint stages
- Caching for faster builds
- Deployment steps (staging, production)
- Environment secrets management
- Conditional execution and matrix builds

name: Performance Profiler
description: Analyzes code for performance bottlenecks and suggests optimizations
description_zh: 分析代码性能瓶颈并建议优化方案
author: community
content:
---
name: performance-profiler
description: Profile and optimize code performance
trigger: /perf
---

Analyze code for performance:
- Identify algorithmic complexity issues (O(n²), etc.)
- Find memory leaks and excessive allocations
- Suggest caching strategies
- Optimize hot paths and critical sections
- Recommend lazy loading and pagination
- Profile database query performance

name: Environment Config Manager
description: Generates and manages environment configuration files
description_zh: 生成和管理环境配置文件
author: community
content:
---
name: env-config
description: Manage environment configurations
trigger: /env
---

Manage environment configurations:
- Generate .env files with required variables
- Create .env.example with placeholder values
- Validate env vars against schema
- Suggest environment-specific configs (dev, staging, prod)
- Handle secrets and sensitive values safely

name: Database Migration Generator
description: Generates database migration scripts for schema changes
description_zh: 为数据库模式变更生成迁移脚本
author: community
content:
---
name: migration-generator
description: Generate database migration scripts
trigger: /migrate
---

Generate database migrations:
- Create up and down migration scripts
- Handle column additions, removals, and renames
- Index creation and management
- Data migrations for existing records
- Rollback safety checks
- Support for major ORMs (Prisma, TypeORM, Diesel, SQLAlchemy)

name: Code Explainer
description: Explains complex code with detailed comments and visualizations
description_zh: 用详细注释和可视化解释复杂代码
author: community
content:
---
name: code-explain
description: Explain complex code in detail
trigger: /explain
---

Explain the code in detail:
- Break down complex logic step by step
- Explain design patterns used
- Describe data flow and state changes
- Highlight potential gotchas
- Add inline comments for clarity
- Provide ASCII diagrams for data structures

name: Type Converter
description: Converts between type systems (TypeScript, JSON Schema, Zod, Prisma, etc.)
description_zh: 在类型系统之间转换（TypeScript、JSON Schema、Zod、Prisma 等）
author: community
content:
---
name: type-converter
description: Convert between type systems
trigger: /types
---

Convert between type/schema formats:
- TypeScript interfaces ↔ JSON Schema
- TypeScript ↔ Zod schemas
- Prisma schema ↔ TypeScript types
- SQL DDL ↔ TypeScript interfaces
- GraphQL types ↔ TypeScript
- OpenAPI schemas ↔ TypeScript

name: E2E Test Generator
description: Generates end-to-end tests using Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium
description_zh: 使用 Playwright、Cypress 或 Selenium 生成端到端测试
author: community
content:
---
name: e2e-test-generator
description: Generate end-to-end tests
trigger: /e2e
---

Generate end-to-end tests:
- Page Object Model pattern
- User flow scenarios
- Form validation tests
- Authentication flow tests
- API mocking and interception
- Visual regression setup
- Cross-browser testing config

name: Accessibility Checker
description: Reviews UI code for WCAG compliance and accessibility issues
description_zh: 检查 UI 代码的 WCAG 合规性和无障碍问题
author: community
content:
---
name: accessibility-checker
description: Check code for accessibility compliance
trigger: /a11y
---

Review code for accessibility:
- ARIA labels and roles
- Keyboard navigation support
- Color contrast ratios (WCAG AA/AAA)
- Screen reader compatibility
- Focus management
- Semantic HTML usage
- Alt text for images

name: README Generator
description: Generates comprehensive README.md files for projects
description_zh: 为项目生成全面的 README.md 文件
author: community
content:
---
name: readme-generator

---

Generate a comprehensive README:
- Project title and description
- Badges (build status, version, license)
- Installation instructions
- Quick start / usage examples
- API documentation
- Contributing guidelines
- License information
- Screenshots or demo links

name: Dependency Auditor
description: Audits project dependencies for security, licenses, and updates
description_zh: 审计项目依赖的安全性、许可证和更新
author: community
content:
---
name: dependency-auditor
description: Audit project dependencies
trigger: /audit
---

Audit project dependencies:
- Check for known vulnerabilities (CVE)
- Review license compatibility
- Identify outdated packages
- Find unused dependencies
- Suggest lighter alternatives
- Check for dependency conflicts

name: Kubernetes Config Generator
description: Generates Kubernetes manifests, Helm charts, and deployment configs
description_zh: 生成 Kubernetes 清单、Helm 图表和部署配置
author: community
content:
---
name: kubernetes-generator

---

Generate Kubernetes configurations:

name: Data Model Designer
description: Designs database schemas and entity-relationship models

author: community
content:
---

---

Design data models:
- Entity-Relationship diagram (ASCII/Mermaid)
- Normalization analysis (1NF, 2NF, 3NF)
- Index strategy recommendations
- Relationship cardinality mapping
- Generate SQL DDL or ORM schemas
- Consider query patterns for optimization

name: AI Agent Builder

description_zh: 帮助构建具有工具使用、记忆和规划能力的 AI Agent

content:

name: ai-agent-builder

Help build AI agents:
